name: HR Cloud
description: HR Cloud provides an end-to-end HR software solution configurable to your workflow and easy to integrate with your other software. Learn more about HR Cloud

reviews.review_pros: It makes easy to integrate all the cycle of Human Resource functions
reviews.review_cons: Customer support service can be improved

reviews.review_title: Great human resources application for a small, growing team
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, I am very pleased with our purchase. I imagine that it will prove its worth even further as our team continues to grow.
reviews.review_pros: The best part about HR Cloud is the constant support. Zvonimir has gone above and beyond to help us create the platform we desired. We also appreciate the ability to customize HR Cloud's functions in a way that I did not experience with some of the competitors. Our biggest use for this software is the Recruit module. It has been a huge time saver in tracking candidates throughout our recruitment process.
reviews.review_cons: Some features were not available out of the box. So there were a few things that took some time to set up. However, this is not completely bad in that we have been able to create a platform that suits our needs with the help of HR Cloud's fantastic support team. Additionally, they have pushed out several updates since we started using HR Cloud a few months ago.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Keeps accurate information on employees, works well with payroll
reviews.review_cons: Has a hard time with large storage. Suffers with large data

reviews.review_description: The team at HRCloud always listens and does whatever they can to make the system work for our needs! I LOVE that I am still working with the same person who managed the original implementation. Representative is knowledgeable, professional and an absolute pleasure to work with. She is always responsive and patient and creative. I feel like HRCloud is on my team.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use and adaptability. I was a previous user of ADP at another company, and when I reviewed HRCloud, it reminded me of the great features found in that product. But HRCloud is BETTER! It is simplere to use and more adapatble; AND the team at HRCloud is able to make quick modifications that customize it to our use without rewriting the program or waiting for another release.
reviews.review_cons: I wish I could see/do more as an administrator from the Hr Cloud App itself, but that isnt really a huge issue.

reviews.review_title: A great time to get HR Cloud!
reviews.review_pros: The system is very user friendly and our employees love the Workmates feature! The customer service team is beyond helpful and take all of our suggestions into consideration. It's been great to see how much HR Cloud has progressed in the short time we've used the system.
reviews.review_cons: There is plenty of room to progress, and we are often making suggestions for ease of use or customization's. While there are some things we wish the system had right now, we feel heard by the HR Cloud team, and trust that the system will only get better with time.

reviews.review_title: A good HR management solution tool.
reviews.review_description: HR Cloud has made managing my team’s HR needs so much easier, especially while everyone is remote working. We stay updated on news, contacts are streamlined, onboarding is more smooth, and I no longer need to fetch paperwork every time someone takes a day off.
reviews.review_pros: I like how easy HR Cloud makes HR onboarding, employee management, and time-off tracking. The user interface is very user-friendly, and their automation features save me a lot of time each day.
reviews.review_cons: Some of the more advanced features need extra configuration to work, and the mobile app is a bit limited.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I really appreciate the secure data storage, centralized data, and automatic updates. It ensures a smooth process for employees.
reviews.review_pros: I love that HR Cloud offers enhanced accessibility and improved data security while reducing the amount of paperwork.
reviews.review_cons: Not ideal for smaller businesses like mine, especially since pricing plans can vary.

reviews.review_description: We have had a good experience with it. It has great features and it is user friendly and provides great security features for data.
reviews.review_pros: Data and time management efficiency. That it provides tools and resources for effective HR processes.
reviews.review_cons: The cost of set up at inception which was a little pricey.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_description: it has been great for holding lots of people to keep up with time
reviews.review_pros: so love it so easy to use and holds a great number of people
reviews.review_cons: i like everything so easy to use and fast

reviews.review_title: Easy navigation interface HR Cloud application
reviews.review_description: Overall the experience was good and I likes the interface.
reviews.review_pros: HR Cloud is easy to navigate. The interface gives a good vibe. Easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: Using it through mobile app it some times routes to web browser. Which creates hassle to route back.

reviews.review_description: very helpful and user friendly for all users
reviews.review_pros: Easy, Self explainitory and navigation is simple
reviews.review_cons: i do not have any cons as of todays date

reviews.review_pros: The speed of doing managerial duties such as tracking of employees progress and giving feedbacks
reviews.review_cons: The cost of HR cloud can be expensive for small or new businesses

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall experience is good and time saving. So many profiles under one umbrella.
reviews.review_pros: All different profiles can be found and hired at one place. It is useful and time saving.
reviews.review_cons: Can you be more simplified in the future.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
reviews.review_pros: The deployment was easy, and I find it so far, not bad.
reviews.review_cons: Still in trial, I'm awaiting some reviews by others here.

reviews.review_title: HR Cloud - Our digital Onboarding Assistant :)
reviews.review_pros: HR Cloud Onboard makes it easier to communicate to the rest of the collegues and new employees all the task that need to be completed in the onboarding process. It eliminates the calls/emails to specific people in company in charge of the individual tasks (Finance, Backoffice, Newhire's manager, IT department...) Workflow emails especially facilitate this process. Regarding the HR Cloud support and consultants, they are always at our disposal and they always go one step further to meet our business demands. Grga is with us from the beginning of the implementation process, through all of our demands for specific adaptations of this application. He answers to our emails no later than within a day, proposes a workaround solution if our initial idea is not possible to execute at the time and we can rely on him to notice the mistakes we sometimes make because he is not just the executor but a critical thinker also.
reviews.review_cons: HR Cloud does not meet our business needs entirely, what is understandable because it isn't a tailor-made solution just for our company. But what is important, they consider every of our demands and try to customize it the best that they can at that moment. That is the thing about them that we value the most and hope that we'll keep that relationship and that we'll keep growing together.

reviews.review_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
reviews.review_description: We're facing mounting compliant requirements in California that will require us to store application documents for many years. HR Cloud made the onboarding process paperless to save us paper file storage space, and forced compliance on the order we offer the forms. We can no work much more efficiently and quickly with the help of HR Cloud.
reviews.review_pros: The software helps with keeping us compliant and can be tailored to what we need. We have different onboarding processes for different positions. The interface is also nicely designed to be easily navigated graphically. If you just need something to help you with onboarding, you can get it done with HRCloud. We cross-shopped the sofware against Agile HR, Zenefit Hire, Clear Company, ICIMS, Workbright, Namely. Nothing came close to the value that HR Cloud brings.
reviews.review_cons: The software is optimized for larger screens has a higher aspect ratio than 4:3 that my monitor offers. As a result, some forms has to be scrolled from left to right on my old monitor.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use, fun animations, superior customer service!!!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: This product does exactly what we needed it to do; engage our team with light, fun announcements. Many of the products we were looking for were just too heavy for what we needed or just too social. Workmates offers a super clean interface. Our team was able to activate their account in one click and there was no training required. It's mobile app is an awesome resource when the team is out of the office or on the go. Simple, fun, easy to use!
reviews.review_cons: We signed on while Workmates was still in development and working out the links. The customer service team was quick to respond to our feedback and had their development team resolve our problem in days.

reviews.review_title: Great company, product and support team!
reviews.review_description: Our goal was to get everything online and less paper. HR Cloud did that for us. They are great to work with and are always trying to make things better!
reviews.review_pros: The ease of use on the new hire side. We consistently hear how nice HR Cloud is when coming on board. Also, the customer service is second to none!
reviews.review_cons: The company is fairly new and we have come across things it doesn't have that we need. But features are being added regularly, and the team is always listening to our needs.

reviews.review_title: Great Platform with Fantastic Service and Support
reviews.review_description: We now have a reliable resource for our very unique onboarding process that maintains both, compliance and efficiency for our company. Additionally, we are working towards eliminating hours of manual data entry thanks to the hard work of the HR Cloud Development team in designing our HRIS integration.
reviews.review_pros: The flexibility and dedication to meet our VERY unique onboarding needs. The HR Cloud development team worked diligently to implement our platform, and continues to roll out updates and enhancements based on feedback or requests.
reviews.review_cons: Limitations with user accounts. Current employees cannot be updated with a company issued email address without requiring a confirmation email. This would not be an issue in most industries, but our field based employees struggle with the process.

reviews.review_description: Our experience with HR Cloud has been great. We have found it to be a extremely helpful tool in keeping all of our employees government compliant as they are on-boarding and continuing in employment with our organization.
reviews.review_pros: At our company we are required to follow a stringent set of State guidelines which includes a mountain of forms and documents for new staff members. This software has simplified our on-boarding process, documents and forms storage, and document renewal in wonderful ways! What was once tedious and time consuming is now quick and easy.
reviews.review_cons: As a relatively new product, there are a few glitches here and there. However, the customer support is exceptional so I can barely count this as a con.

reviews.review_description: Overall, I'm very happy. I went from a manual, paper-intensive HR process to 100% digital because of HR Cloud.
reviews.review_pros: Excellent implementation and post-sale customer service. My Implementation Consultant - Grga - is easily reachable and able to quickly implement whatever I need.
reviews.review_cons: I wish the self-service capabilities were a little more accessible and easier to use.

reviews.review_title: Great product - more that meets the eye
reviews.review_description: Excellent software, excellent customer service, lots of flexibility. Very helpful and friendly product team
reviews.review_pros: Very easy to use Great UI\UX interface Performance is excellent Product allows for customization
reviews.review_cons: Would be great to have the ability to 'white label' the product

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: The ability to customize pages and create dynamic forms for simple onboarding.
reviews.review_cons: Not able to organize documents and some of the terms used in the programming could be miscategorized. For example : uploading a document and selecting "everyone" as the view would be the employee and other managers only but it reads as everyone within our company could view the document.

reviews.review_title: Implementation process made a difference with HR Cloud software!
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Extremely pleased with my experience. I needed to onboard almost 100 users and HR Cloud was able to get us set up quickly. The implementation process and support from beginning to end was excellent. Our implementation specialist got me set up in no time. I didn't have a hard time explaining our requirements and process. He is very responsive and offered solutions that streamlined our processes. I couldn't be happier.
reviews.review_pros: Great product, user friendly, easy to use, excellent customer support and implementation process
reviews.review_cons: None at the moment although I can only look forward to whatever enhancements are put in place.

reviews.review_title: It's the internal social network that companies need now.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Gets everyone at my company on the same page and helps me see what is going on at all of our other offices.
reviews.review_pros: You can recognize your coworkers with kudos and the company directory is very useful to find information faster than looking it up elsewhere. Plus it's free!
reviews.review_cons: There is more functionality on the web version than the mobile but the mobile is really easy to use.
